issues.description: Effect array is empty. Card has complex trigger condition '[Opponent's Turn] [Once Per Turn] When your number of Life cards becomes 0' with two actions: (1) add 1 card from top of deck to top of Life cards, (2) trash 1 card from hand. This requires at least one effect object with trigger, conditions, and actions.
[Opponent's Turn] in effect text requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn', not permanent or EndOfTurn.
